original_abstract: Soccer, the most popular mass spectator sport in the world, is a game where humanity comes alive with one goal. But beyond its obvious entertainment aspect, the game has become a major social phenomenon since the late nineteenth century. Through the social prism of soccer, scholars across the world have tended to understand various aspects of life - politics, culture, economy, religion, aesthetics, media, tourism, and so on. Soccer & Society , the first international journal devoted to the game of soccer, aims to focus on the game in the context of a more global world, covering all aspects of soccer impacting society from a wide array of perspectives - anthropological, cultural, historical, sociological, political, economic and aesthetic. It intends to serve as an inter-disciplinary forum to respond to the ever-growing relationship between soccer and various significant areas of modern life. The journal intends to become truly international in terms of content, perspective and space. It is committed to encouraging original empirical research from scholars across the world.
humanized_abstract: Soccer (or football as it is known in most of the world) is the most popular mass spectatorsport. It is a dynamic game in which the very soul of humanity is embodied with the sole object of scoring goals. Besides the inherent amusement value of the beautiful game, soccer has become a significant socio-cultural phenomenon since late nineteenth century and scholars all over the world have been using the social lens of the beautiful game to explain and analyse politics, culture, economy, religion, art and media and tourism and numerous other aspects of contemporary society. Soccer & Society is the first international journal dedicated to the study of the most popular sport in the world. It is an interdisciplinary journal that aims to cover all aspects of the socio-cultural impact of soccer from all relevant angles and perspectives including anthropological, cultural, historical, sociological, political, economic and aesthetic. The journal aspires to function as a forum for multidisciplinary discussion of the multifaceted relationship between the beautiful game of soccer and the many significant dynamics of contemporary modern life. This journal will be truly international in terms of content, perspective and space, promoting new and innovative research by scholars from all corners of the globe.
